title: Pre-ticket audit: research run without fixture-mode
problem: Live staged orchestrator and operator verification runbook are complete, but `research run` without `--fixture-mode` remains not_implemented. A focused pre-ticket audit should define hardened scope before any implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit defines scope, env gates, mock vs live boundaries, and rollback for non-fixture research run.
Verdict GO or NO-GO with hardened scope for follow-on implementation ticket.
rollback_plan: Remove audit report; retain fixture-mode paths.
